item_text: the diagram models a sequence of events where the user inserts a signal, which may be incomplete or incorrect, leading to a loop of re-trying the insertion.
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-signal-005 title: insert signal with looping incomplete data module: signal source pages: 4 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - description: - image: valid image test steps: 1. click on the "insert signal" button. 2. leave the description field empty. 3. upload a valid image. 4. click on the "submit" button. 5. wait for the firebase/firestore and firebase/storage components to process the signal. 6. check if the signal insertion fails due to incomplete data. 7. repeat steps 2-5 until the signal is inserted successfully. expected result: the signal should eventually be inserted successfully after completing all required fields.
